thinking.intro: I'm João Guilherme — a Software Developer building AI solutions, and a Computer Science student at UFF.
thinking.body: I currently integrate AI models into marketing and web flows at my day job. Simultaneously, my academic journey is heavily focused on data science and SQL architecture. I am actively exploring real-world applications of these concepts through research and independent projects.
